metadata_json.revision_goal: Baseline deliverables meet the artifact contract and pass deterministic checks. Calculations (blank correction, delta comparisons, dilution arithmetic) are correct and traceable to the packet values. Plate-level QC was applied correctly (blank 0.10 > cutoff 0.08 => invalidate plate). Documentation clearly states assumptions, uncertainty caveats, and recommended laboratory review. Verifier noted a minor non-file evidence_ref string in grader evidence_refs, but this did not affect grounding or scores.
